The '''Pocket Patrol Boat (PPB)''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]-built [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] design used by the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]].

It was armed with one turret mounted Heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] but the power drain caused by firing the weapon led to a slow rate of fire. The PPB was a rather fast craft, having engaged and damaged the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. This small fighter traded armor for speed and was used to defend the planet of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]''
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{Mo}}
